―✦ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓹𝓵𝓸𝓽 !

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Theron, Elena and Terry had been best friends since they were kids. They did everything together. Elena was just so caring, so Theron couldn’t help the way he fell more and more in love with each year that passed. Theron was deeply in love with Elena and was willing to do anything for her.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Terry, Theron’s brother, was also deeply in love with Elena. But it just so happens that Elena turned out to be in love with Terry as well. The two spent time alone together, seemed more intimate than normal friends would be— but Theron didn’t notice. He was too busy with royal duties and admiring Elena to notice that Terry and she were starting to become more than friends.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 And the day finally came. Elena and Terry had gotten engaged. Theron was heartbroken, and within just a few days, his once healthy body and had begun to deteriorate. He was coughing up blood. Not just blood, but petals. Flower petals. Theron spent less time outside and more time in his office, not telling a single soul about his disease as he tried to desperately search for a cure.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Theron had spent a whole week being stuck in his office, working himself to death all while trying to find a cure for this disease which was slowly killing him. He decided to make use of the remaining time he had left before he died, and decided to go to the town square.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
